text:
Harish Salve, a renowned Indian lawyer, represented the Indian Olympic Association in the case of wrestler Vinesh Phogat's disqualification at the Paris Olympics. Phogat, who became the first Indian woman wrestler to reach an Olympic final, was disqualified for being 100gm overweight. She subsequently took her case to the Court of Arbitration for Sport.
